data.title: Birch Gold Group to give away 1 oz Christmas-themed silver rounds to customers who buy between Dec 1-22, 2025.
data.description: Today in Des Moines, Iowa, Birch Gold Group revealed the revival of a popular festive deal: customers buying between December 1 and December 22, 2025, will receive free 1 oz Christmas-themed silver rounds. This offer extends to new and existing customers and includes Precious metals purchases.

data.title: "Reach the World Day on Dec 13, hosted by David Jeremiah, a Christmas outreach event in San Diego for second consecutive year."
data.description: For the second consecutive year, the evangelistic Christmas outreach program, Reach the World Day, hosted by Turning Point with David Jeremiah, will take place in San Diego on December 5, 2025. This event is part of Dr. David Jeremiah's annual efforts to spread the message of Christmas. The program aims to attract a large audience and reach a significant number of people, making a positive impact on the community during the holiday season.

data.title: BingX introduces Recurring Buy to assist users in navigating crypto market swings, helping beginners in accessing the market easily and confidently.
data.description: Today, BingX, a renowned Web3 AI company and cryptocurrency exchange, revealed the introduction of Recurring Buy, a new spot-trading feature on December 5, 2025. This innovative tool aims to assist newcomers in navigating the cryptocurrency market by simplifying the trading process and increasing their confidence amidst market fluctuations. Through automation, Recurring Buy streamlines...

data.title: Netflix is purchasing Warner Bros for $83 billion, acquiring TV/film studios and HBO Max to strengthen its streaming service.
data.description: The acquisition of Hollywood's prominent television and film studios, along with HBO Max, will significantly enhance the leading paid streaming service in the world.

data.title: Victoria's Secret & Co reports Q3 net sales of $1.472 billion, up 9%. Raises FY2025 guidance: net sales $6.450-6.480 billion, operating income $350-375 million. Q3 operating loss $19 million, net loss $37 million. 2025 adjusted net income per diluted share: $2.40-$2.65. Retailer remains optimistic for a successful holiday season and long-term growth.
data.description: Victoria's Secret & Co. reported a net sales of $1.472 billion in the third quarter of 2025, a 9% increase compared to the prior year. The company exceeded expectations on operating results and earnings, with an increase in net sales driven by strength across Victoria's Secret, PINK, and Beauty. The company raised its fiscal year 2025 net sales forecast to be between $6.450 billion to $6.480 billion and adjusted operating income to be in the range of $350 million to $375 million. The adjusted net income per diluted share for the full year 2025 is estimated to be in the range of $2.40 to $2.65. The company also provided a forecast for the fourth quarter of 2025, expecting net sales to be in the range of $2.170 billion to $2.200 billion. Victoria's Secret & Co. is optimistic about their continued growth and strong finish to the year.

data.title: Dow Jones futures increased as market nears record highs, Netflix agrees to buy Warner Bros. Ulta Beauty led earnings.
data.description: Stock market futures increased as the market approached all-time highs. Netflix has made a deal to acquire Warner Bros, but it is uncertain if regulators will approve the acquisition. Ulta Beauty reported strong earnings after hours. The Dow Jones futures are on the rise amid these developments.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs record $194M outflow, highest in 2 weeks. Analysts suggest institutional investors unwinding leveraged positions.
data.description: Financial analysts suggest that institutional investors may be reducing leveraged positions and basis trades based on current market trends. This adjustment could impact the stability of the market and potentially influence future investment decisions.

data.title: Turkish exchange Paribu acquires majority of CoinMENA in a deal worth up to $240 million, expanding its presence.
data.description: In a recent acquisition, Paribu has acquired a controlling interest in CoinMENA, a trading platform licensed in Dubai and Bahrain. The deal has estimated the total worth of the exchange to be around $240 million.

data.title: Troilus Gold Corp. changes name to Troilus Mining Corp; ticker renamed to TSX: TLG, OTCQX: CHXMF; FSE: CM5R. Shareholder approval given at Dec. 4, 2025 Annual & Special Meeting.
data.description: Troilus Mining Corp., previously known as Troilus Gold Corp., has successfully changed its name to Troilus Mining Corp. and "Corporation minière Troilus" in French. This decision was made after receiving approval from shareholders at the Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders on December 4, 2025. The company's stock symbols are TSX: TLG, OTCQX: CHXMF, and FSE: CM5R.
Koryx Copper gives project updates in Zambia: drill targets identified at Luanshya West, regional surface geochemistry at Mpongwe done.

data.title: Gaming and Leisure Properties updates $1.5 billion capital commitments for five major projects with four partners.
data.description: Wyomissing-based Gaming and Leisure Properties, Inc. (NASDAQ: GLPI) shared updates on progress milestones for five projects involving four partners, totaling around $1.5 billion in GLPI capital commitments. The projects include Caesars Republic Sonoma County, Bally’s Chicago, Bally’s Baton Rouge, PENN Entertainment’s M Resort, and Ione Band of Miwok Indians’ Acorn Ridge. The company highlighted recent developments related to these commitments.

data.title: Iridex Corp. (Nasdaq: IRIX) to present at Sidoti Year-End Virtual Investor Conference on Dec 05, 2025. Leader in laser medical systems for glaucoma and retinal diseases.
data.description: Iridex Corporation, a global leader in providing advanced laser medical equipment for treating glaucoma and retinal diseases, is set to take part in the upcoming Sidoti Year-End Virtual Investor Conference. The event is scheduled for December 05, 2025. Iridex Corporation is listed on Nasdaq with the symbol IRIX.

data.title: Signing Day Sports announces AI/HPC infrastructure opportunity; Chairman's shareholder letter released. Stock symbol: SGN.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Signing Day Sports, Inc. (NYSE American: SGN) headquartered in Scottsdale, AZ, published a shareholder letter from its Chairman and CEO, Daniel Nelson.

data.title: Gabriel Holding A/S discloses GAB Invest ApS transaction exceeding EUR 50,000 limit for 2025 under Market Abuse Regulation.
data.description: Gabriel Holding A/S has released details of a transaction as per Article 19 of the Market Abuse Regulation. GAB Invest ApS has surpassed the reporting threshold of EUR 50,000 for its total transactions in 2025 with this particular transaction.
